reviews.comment:
Estuvimos de paso, cargamos combustible y comimos en la full. Muy buena atención del personal. Muy atentos y los baños muy limpios.excelente lugar para hacer una pausa en el camino.

(Translated by Google)
We were passing through, filled up with gas, and had lunch at the full service station. The staff was very attentive and the restrooms were very clean. An excellent place to stop for a break on the road.

reviews.comment:
Pare a comer, solo tenía hamburguesas con queso recalentadas, estaba horribles, pedí factura A, me hicieron cualquier cosas, pusieron mal el nombre y  el número de cuit un desastre.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped to eat, I only had reheated cheeseburgers, they were horrible, I asked for invoice A, they did all kinds of things to me, they put the name and the tax number wrong, it was a disaster.

reviewReply.comment: Buen dia. Me pasa info fecha y horario estimado para ver el tema.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1eHZXazdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El agua pará los termos tendría que ser gratis ya que las estaciones cobran usó de playa lo único que le veo negativo después excelente

(Translated by Google)
The water for the thermoses should be free since the stations charge for beach use, which is the only negative I see; otherwise, it's excellent.
